allow: PowerShell($body = '{"phone":"+33612345678","code":"000000"}'; $req = [System.Net.HttpWebRequest]::Create\("http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/v1/auth/dev-signin"\); $req.Method = "POST"; $req.ContentType = "application/json"; $req.Timeout = 8000; $writer = New-Object System.IO.StreamWriter\($req.GetRequestStream\(\)\); $writer.Write\($body\); $writer.Close\(\); try { $resp = $req.GetResponse\(\); $r = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($resp.GetResponseStream\(\)\); "OK $\($resp.StatusCode.value__\) - $\($r.ReadToEnd\(\)\)" } catch [System.Net.WebException] { $resp = $_.Exception.Response; if \($resp\) { $r = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($resp.GetResponseStream\(\)\); $b = $r.ReadToEnd\(\); "STATUS $\($resp.StatusCode.value__\) CT=$\($resp.ContentType\) LEN=$\($resp.ContentLength\)`nBODY: <<$b>>" } else { "NORESP: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($body = '{"phone":"+33698765432","code":"000000"}'; $req = [System.Net.HttpWebRequest]::Create\("http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/v1/auth/dev-signin"\); $req.Method = "POST"; $req.ContentType = "application/json"; $req.Timeout = 15000; $writer = New-Object System.IO.StreamWriter\($req.GetRequestStream\(\)\); $writer.Write\($body\); $writer.Close\(\); try { $resp = $req.GetResponse\(\); $r = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($resp.GetResponseStream\(\)\); "OK $\($resp.StatusCode.value__\) LEN $\($resp.ContentLength\)`nBODY-SNIPPET: $\($r.ReadToEnd\(\).Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(300,500\)\)\)" } catch [System.Net.WebException] { $resp = $_.Exception.Response; if \($resp\) { $r = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($resp.GetResponseStream\(\)\); $b = $r.ReadToEnd\(\); "STATUS $\($resp.StatusCode.value__\) CT=$\($resp.ContentType\) LEN=$\($resp.ContentLength\)`nBODY: <<$b>>" } else { "NORESP: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })
